concerns.text: T030 creates task_definitions.yaml with 'multiple multi-modal task definitions' but plan.md explicitly requires 20 tasks. This scope ambiguity could silently weaken the research design (20 tasks required for statistical power per Constitution VII).

Constitution II (Verified Accuracy) requires Reference-Validator Agent for citation verification, but no task exists to implement this agent. Plan marks Constitution II as 'PARTIAL' without a blocking task to resolve this gap.

Constitution V requires updating state/projects/PROJ-573-https-arxiv-org-abs-2604-27351.yaml updated_at timestamp on artifact changes. T016 implements checksum tracking but no task explicitly addresses the timestamp update requirement.

T027 requires report to include t-statistic, p-value, bootstrap CI but FR-014 designates Wilcoxon effect sizes with 95% CI as PRIMARY outcome. Task does not explicitly prioritize Wilcoxon over t-test in report structure.

T056 specifies CI width ≤15% for reproducibility verification but SC-004 only states 'within 95% CI' without width threshold. This implementation-specific constraint should be documented in spec as staged.

T026 implements Wilcoxon effect size using r = Z/sqrt(N) which is not explicitly specified in FR-014. Should clarify if alternative effect size metrics are acceptable or if this formula must be documented in spec.
